prompt: Simulate being the Red Hat Lightspeed Agent responding to a real user. Show the actual response, including simulated tool calls with realistic data.

assertions.name: fetches_all_pages_for_remediatable
assertions.description: For per-system remediatable CVE queries, fetches all pages automatically

assertions.name: uses_remediation_filter
assertions.description: Uses remediation=Applicable parameter when querying system CVEs

assertions.name: table_format_output
assertions.description: Presents results in a table format with host name, OS, CVE counts

assertions.name: no_tool_names_in_response
assertions.description: The user-facing response does not expose internal tool names

assertions.name: offers_continuation
assertions.description: If more data exists beyond what's shown, offers to fetch more or apply filters

assertions.name: read_only_caveat
assertions.description: Mentions that patching must be done through normal change management, not this agent
